headline: RIS Rx Welcomes Industry Pioneer Tom Doyle as Senior Advisor
summary: IRVINE, Calif., April 23, 2026--RIS Rx welcomes Tom Doyle as Senior Advisor, strengthening its leadership in real-time GTN Revenue Protection for pharmaceutical manufacturers.
